description:
A stunning architectural masterpiece nestled in the prestigious hills of Beverly Hills. This contemporary estate offers breathtaking panoramic views of the city skyline and Pacific Ocean. Designed by award-winning architect James Thornton, every detail has been meticulously curated — from the 30-foot ceilings in the grand entry to the seamless indoor-outdoor living spaces that blur the line between luxury and nature.

The chef's kitchen features Miele appliances, custom Boffi cabinetry, and a dramatic waterfall island in Calacatta marble. The primary suite is a private sanctuary with a spa-inspired bathroom, dual walk-in closets, and a private terrace overlooking the infinity pool. Four additional en-suite bedrooms ensure comfort for family and guests alike.

Entertainment is effortless with a home theater, temperature-controlled wine cellar, gym, and a resort-style backyard complete with a heated infinity pool, spa, fire pit, and outdoor kitchen.

Perched directly on the Malibu coastline, this extraordinary contemporary retreat delivers an unparalleled oceanfront living experience. Floor-to-ceiling glass walls frame endless Pacific Ocean views from virtually every room in the home. Wake up to the sound of waves and watch the sun set over the water from your private deck.

The open-concept living and dining area flows effortlessly to a dramatic wraparound terrace, perfect for entertaining or quiet reflection. The gourmet kitchen is outfitted with professional-grade appliances and custom millwork. The primary suite occupies the entire top floor, featuring panoramic ocean views, a soaking tub positioned to capture the sunrise, and direct access to a private rooftop deck.

A rare offering — direct beach access via private stairs makes this one of the most coveted oceanfront properties on the California coast.

Tucked behind private gates on over an acre of manicured grounds, this timeless Bel Air estate exudes elegance and grandeur. The stately motor court leads to an impressive double-height entry adorned with a custom chandelier and sweeping staircase.

The sprawling floor plan encompasses formal living and dining rooms, a wood-paneled library, and a gourmet kitchen that opens to a charming family room with stone fireplace. Six generously proportioned bedroom suites include a palatial primary retreat with dual bathrooms and closets, a private sitting room, and a covered loggia.

The resort-caliber grounds feature a swimmer's pool with waterfall, lighted tennis court, a detached guest house, and extensive al fresco entertaining areas — a true sanctuary steps from the heart of Los Angeles.

A sophisticated modern farmhouse beautifully situated in the sought-after Pacific Palisades community. This light-filled retreat artfully combines warm, natural materials — white oak floors, exposed beam ceilings, and Venetian plaster walls — with clean contemporary lines for a timeless yet fresh aesthetic.

The heart of the home is a spectacular great room with 14-foot vaulted ceilings, a fireplace clad in ledger stone, and bi-fold doors that open fully to the private garden patio. The kitchen is a chef's dream with unlacquered brass fixtures, honed Calacatta marble counters, and a Lacanche range. The serene primary suite offers canyon views, a spa bath with freestanding soaking tub, and a generous walk-in closet.

Located moments from the Village, top-rated schools, hiking trails, and world-class surf.

The crown jewel of Skyline Residences, Penthouse 01 sets a new standard for luxury high-rise living in the heart of West Hollywood. Occupying the entire top floor, this sky home offers 360-degree views of the Hollywood Hills, downtown Los Angeles, and the Pacific Ocean from wrap-around terraces totaling over 1,200 square feet of outdoor living.

The interiors were designed by the celebrated studio Brenhouse & Partners, featuring wide-plank white oak floors, custom built-ins, and a palette of warm neutrals and metals. The open chef's kitchen with Gaggenau appliances and wine storage flows to a dramatic living room anchored by a 96-inch linear fireplace. The primary suite is a true retreat with dual custom closets and a spa bathroom wrapped in book-matched Grigio marble.

Building amenities include a 24-hour concierge, rooftop pool and lounge, screening room, fitness center, and private wine storage.

A jewel box of modern California living, this recently constructed Santa Monica home perfectly captures the coveted indoor-outdoor lifestyle. Set on a tree-lined street in one of Santa Monica's most desirable neighborhoods, the home balances architectural ambition with warmth and livability.

Natural light pours through walls of glass onto Venetian white oak floors and custom plaster walls. The great room opens to a lushly landscaped backyard oasis featuring a zero-edge pool, built-in BBQ station, and multiple lounging areas. The kitchen — featured in Architectural Digest — boasts custom walnut cabinetry, quartzite waterfall counters, and a professional 60-inch range.

Five spacious bedroom suites, a dedicated home office, and a rooftop deck with ocean peeks complete this extraordinary offering, just blocks from Montana Avenue boutiques and moments from the beach.
